---
title: "Exmaple NACE back-classification pipeline"
format: html # This qmd file will be compiled as an HTML web page
---

__Open the associated notebook__: <a href="https://datalab.sspcloud.fr/launcher/ide/vscode-python?name=Notebook1&version=2.3.19&s3=region-79669f20&init.personalInit=«https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2FAIML4OS%2FAIML4OS-template-quarto-python%2Frefs%2Fheads%2Fmain%2Fsspcloud%2Finit-trainees.sh»&init.personalInitArgs=«notebooks%2Fnotebook1.ipynb»&git.repository=«https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FAIML4OS%2FAIML4OS-template-quarto-python.git»&autoLaunch=true" target="_blank" rel="noopener" data-original-href="https://datalab.sspcloud.fr/launcher/ide/vscode-python?name=Notebook1&version=2.3.19&s3=region-79669f20&init.personalInit=«https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2FAIML4OS%2FAIML4OS-template-quarto-python%2Frefs%2Fheads%2Fmain%2Fsspcloud%2Finit-trainees.sh»&init.personalInitArgs=«notebooks%2Fnotebook1.ipynb»&git.repository=«https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FAIML4OS%2FAIML4OS-template-quarto-python.git»&autoLaunch=true"><img src="https://custom-icon-badges.demolab.com/badge/SSP%20Cloud-Launch_with_RStudio-blue?logo=vsc&amp;logoColor=white" alt="Onyxia"></a>

# Pipline overview

![Back-classification pipeline](../images/NACE-diagram-implementation.png)

# Example notebooks

- [Model training notebook](../notebooks/train_model.ipynb)
- [Back classification inference notebook](../notebooks/back_classification.ipynb)
